raft.name: Raft
raft.space: 10 ft long, 10 ft wide, 2 ft high
raft.description: A simple flat platform of lashed logs poled or rowed across calm water.

cart.name: Cart
cart.space: 10 ft long, 5 ft wide, 4 ft high
cart.description: A simple two-wheeled hauling cart drawn by a single large draft animal.

chariot-light.name: Chariot (Light)
chariot-light.space: 5 ft long, 5 ft wide, 4 ft high
chariot-light.description: A fast, lightweight chariot drawn by a single large animal for racing or skirmishing.

glider.name: Glider
glider.space: 5 ft long, 10 ft wide, 2 ft high
glider.description: A simple winged frame that lets a single pilot ride air currents in unpowered flight.

rowboat.name: Rowboat
rowboat.space: 10 ft long, 5 ft wide, 3 ft high
rowboat.description: A small open boat propelled by oars, suited for short trips and ferrying a handful of passengers.

sled.name: Sled
sled.space: 5 ft long, 1 ft wide, 3 ft high
sled.description: A simple runner-mounted sled pulled across snow and ice by animals to haul a rider or light cargo.

armored-carriage.name: Armored Carriage
armored-carriage.space: 10 ft long, 10 ft wide, 10 ft high
armored-carriage.description: A reinforced clockwork carriage that protects its pilot and passengers behind armored plating.

automated-cycle.name: Automated Cycle
automated-cycle.space: 5 ft long, 10 ft wide, 3 ft high
automated-cycle.description: A small clockwork cycle that carries a single rider quickly along roads and trails.

battery-tower.name: Battery Tower
battery-tower.space: 50 ft long, 50 ft wide, 90 ft high
battery-tower.description: A massive mobile siege tower pushed and cranked into position by hundreds of laborers to assault fortifications.

clunkerjunker.name: Clunkerjunker
clunkerjunker.space: 10 ft long, 5 ft wide, 5 ft high
clunkerjunker.description: A cheap, rickety alchemical-powered cart cobbled together from spare parts.

sleigh.name: Sleigh
sleigh.space: 10 ft long, 5 ft wide, 4 ft high
sleigh.description: A larger animal-drawn sleigh that glides over snow on runners, carrying several passengers and their goods.

velocipede.name: Velocipede
velocipede.space: 5 ft long, 2 ft wide, 4 ft high
velocipede.description: A simple pedal-driven personal cycle propelled at the pilot's own Speed.

wagon.name: Wagon
wagon.space: 10 ft long, 10 ft wide, 7 ft high
wagon.description: A simple four-wheeled wagon pulled by draft animals to haul passengers and cargo.

adaptable-paddleboat.name: Adaptable Paddleboat
adaptable-paddleboat.space: 10 ft long, 5 ft wide, 4 ft high
adaptable-paddleboat.description: A small clockwork-driven paddleboat that one pilot can adapt to navigate varied waterways.

carriage.name: Carriage
carriage.space: 10 ft long, 10 ft wide, 7 ft high
carriage.description: An enclosed four-wheeled passenger vehicle pulled by two large draft animals.

hot-air-balloon.name: Hot Air Balloon
hot-air-balloon.space: 15 ft long, 15 ft wide, 50 ft high
hot-air-balloon.description: A lighter-than-air balloon with a passenger basket that drifts on the wind under a single pilot's control.

steam-cart.name: Steam Cart
steam-cart.space: 10 ft long, 5 ft wide, 4 ft high
steam-cart.description: A self-propelled alchemical steam-powered cart that hauls cargo or a single pilot without need of a draft animal.

chariot-heavy.name: Chariot (Heavy)
chariot-heavy.space: 10 ft long, 10 ft wide, 4 ft high
chariot-heavy.description: A sturdy war chariot drawn by two large beasts, built to carry fighters into battle.

clockwork-wagon.name: Clockwork Wagon
clockwork-wagon.space: 10 ft long, 10 ft wide, 7 ft high
clockwork-wagon.description: A self-propelled clockwork cart that hauls goods or passengers without draft animals.

magic-broom.name: Flying Broom
magic-broom.description: An enchanted broom that flies on command, carrying one rider (and a light load).

sand-diver.name: Sand Diver
sand-diver.space: 15 ft long, 6 ft wide, 6 ft high
sand-diver.description: A small alchemical vehicle that can burrow beneath the desert surface as well as travel across it.

firework-pogo.name: Firework Pogo
firework-pogo.space: 5 ft long, 5 ft wide, 5 ft high
firework-pogo.description: An alchemical jump-jet pogo device that propels a single rider in explosive bounding leaps.

hillcross-glider.name: Hillcross Glider
hillcross-glider.space: 10 ft long, 10 ft wide, 3 ft high
hillcross-glider.description: A sturdier crafted glider that carries a single pilot on longer, more controlled flights than a basic glider.

siege-tower.name: Siege Tower
siege-tower.space: 20 ft long, 20 ft wide, 40 ft high
siege-tower.description: A towering wheeled wooden structure pushed by its crew up to fortifications so attackers can scale enemy walls.

steam-trolley.name: Steam Trolley
steam-trolley.space: 15 ft long, 10 ft wide, 8 ft high
steam-trolley.description: A larger steam-powered passenger and cargo trolley that runs on alchemical power and carries a small crew.

bathysphere.name: Bathysphere
bathysphere.space: 15 ft long, 15 ft wide, 15 ft high
bathysphere.description: A spherical alchemical diving vessel that carries a pilot to explore the ocean depths.

firefly.name: Firefly
firefly.space: 10 ft long, 10 ft wide, 10 ft high
firefly.description: A small magically powered hovering craft that floats above the ground carrying a single pilot.

karakoa.name: Karakoa
karakoa.space: 80 ft long, 40 ft wide, 30 ft high
karakoa.description: A large outrigger warship propelled by rowers and sail, swift across coastal waters.

cauldron-of-flying.name: Cauldron of Flying
cauldron-of-flying.space: 5 ft long, 5 ft wide, 4 ft high
cauldron-of-flying.description: An enchanted iron cauldron large enough to carry a rider as it soars through the air.

clockwork-hopper.name: Clockwork Hopper
clockwork-hopper.space: 10 ft long, 10 ft wide, 12 ft high
clockwork-hopper.description: A legged clockwork vehicle that bounds across terrain carrying a lone pilot.

cutter.name: Cutter
cutter.space: 30 ft long, 15 ft wide, 20 ft high
cutter.description: A small single-masted sailing ship crewed by a pilot and three sailors.

sand-barge.name: Sand Barge
sand-barge.space: 30 ft long, 20 ft wide, 15 ft high
sand-barge.description: A broad flat-bottomed craft that glides over desert dunes under sail or oar to haul goods across the sands.

sky-chariot-light.name: Sky Chariot (Light)
sky-chariot-light.space: 10 ft long, 15 ft wide, 8 ft high
sky-chariot-light.description: A nimble flying chariot drawn by a pair of winged creatures, offering swift aerial transport for a small load.

snail-coach.name: Snail Coach
snail-coach.space: 30 ft long, 10 ft wide, 15 ft high
snail-coach.description: An alchemically animated coach built around a giant snail-like shell that can climb sheer surfaces as it travels.

strider.name: Strider
strider.space: 10 ft long, 10 ft wide, 25 ft high
strider.description: A tall walking war-machine that strides across the battlefield on mechanical legs powered by alchemy and magic.

longship.name: Longship
longship.space: 65 ft long, 15 ft wide, 25 ft high
longship.description: A long, shallow-draft raiding ship driven by oars and a single sail for swift coastal and river voyages.

mobile-inn.name: Mobile Inn
mobile-inn.space: 20 ft long, 20 ft wide, 13 ft high
mobile-inn.description: A self-propelled alchemical wagon outfitted as a traveling tavern and lodging house for road-weary adventurers.

clockwork-borer.name: Clockwork Borer
clockwork-borer.space: 20 ft long, 8 ft wide, 8 ft high
clockwork-borer.description: A massive clockwork drilling machine that burrows through earth and stone while carrying a single pilot.

clockwork-bumblebee.name: Clockwork Bumblebee
clockwork-bumblebee.space: 20 ft long, 10 ft wide, 8 ft high
clockwork-bumblebee.description: A bee-shaped clockwork flying machine crewed by a pilot and two assistants.

sailing-ship.name: Sailing Ship
sailing-ship.space: 75 ft long, 20 ft wide, 25 ft high
sailing-ship.description: A large wind-driven seagoing vessel crewed by sailors for long ocean voyages and cargo hauling.

cliff-crawler.name: Cliff Crawler
cliff-crawler.space: 30 ft long, 15 ft wide, 20 ft high
cliff-crawler.description: A magically animated walking vehicle that scales sheer cliffs and vertical surfaces with ease.

galley.name: Galley
galley.space: 130 ft long, 20 ft wide, 25 ft high
galley.description: A large oar-and-sail warship crewed by rowers and built for ramming enemy vessels at sea.

flying-carpet.name: Magic Carpet
flying-carpet.description: An enchanted carpet that carries riders aloft on command; an invested magic item that flies at the pilot's direction.

sky-chariot-medium.name: Sky Chariot (Medium)
sky-chariot-medium.space: 10 ft long, 20 ft wide, 8 ft high
sky-chariot-medium.description: A mid-sized flying chariot pulled by winged beasts, balancing carrying capacity and maneuverability for aerial travel.

speedster.name: Speedster
speedster.space: 10 ft long, 5 ft wide, 5 ft high
speedster.description: A fast clockwork-and-alchemical land vehicle built for a single pilot to race across the ground at high speed.

apparatus-of-the-octopus.name: Apparatus of the Octopus
apparatus-of-the-octopus.space: 10 ft long, 10 ft wide, 5 ft high
apparatus-of-the-octopus.description: An octopus-shaped clockwork submersible that walks slowly on land but swims swiftly underwater for a single pilot.

atakebune.name: Atakebune
atakebune.space: 75 ft long, 30 ft wide, 30 ft high
atakebune.description: A heavily fortified oar-driven warship rowed by a crew to dominate naval engagements.

shark-diver.name: Shark Diver
shark-diver.space: 40 ft long, 20 ft wide, 20 ft high
shark-diver.description: An alchemically powered submersible shaped like a shark that lets its pilot and crew travel and explore beneath the waves.

warship.name: Warship
warship.space: 120 ft long, 30 ft wide, 25 ft high
warship.description: A heavy oceangoing warship with reinforced hull and mounts for siege weapons (ballistae, catapults).

airship.name: Airship
airship.space: 90 ft long, 30 ft wide, 60 ft high
airship.description: A large alchemical and magical flying vessel crewed by a pilot and several hands to sail the skies.

geobukseon.name: Geobukseon
geobukseon.space: 110 ft long, 35 ft wide, 40 ft high
geobukseon.description: An armored turtle-ship warship with a hardened spiked shell that resists boarding and ramming.

second-kiss.name: Second Kiss
second-kiss.space: 300 ft long, 50 ft wide, 60 ft high
second-kiss.description: An enormous flying airship that cruises the skies as a mobile vessel for crew and passengers.

baochuan.name: Baochuan
baochuan.space: 300 ft long, 50 ft wide, 40 ft high
baochuan.description: An enormous wind-driven treasure ship crewed by hundreds for long ocean-spanning voyages.

sky-chariot-heavy.name: Sky Chariot (Heavy)
sky-chariot-heavy.space: 20 ft long, 20 ft wide, 8 ft high
sky-chariot-heavy.description: The largest flying chariot, pulled aloft by powerful winged creatures to carry passengers and cargo through the sky.

ambling-surveyor.name: Ambling Surveyor
ambling-surveyor.space: 15 ft long, 15 ft wide, 20 ft high
ambling-surveyor.description: A walking clockwork-and-magical exploration platform that ambles across terrain while its crew surveys the surroundings.

steam-giant.name: Steam Giant
steam-giant.space: 20 ft long, 20 ft wide, 25 ft high
steam-giant.description: A towering steam-driven mechanical colossus piloted from within that smashes through obstacles and foes alike.

djong.name: Djong
djong.space: 250 ft long, 100 ft wide, 50 ft high
djong.description: A colossal ocean-going sailing vessel propelled by wind and hundreds of rowers.

sand-racer.name: Sand Racer
sand-racer.space: 10 ft long, 5 ft wide, 5 ft high
sand-racer.description: A blisteringly fast thasteron-fueled racing vehicle that tears across the dunes leaving fire in its wake.

titanic-stomper.name: Titanic Stomper
titanic-stomper.space: 60 ft long, 30 ft wide, 60 ft high
titanic-stomper.description: An enormous electrically and magically powered walking machine that crushes everything beneath its colossal feet.

clockwork-castle.name: Clockwork Castle
clockwork-castle.space: 30 ft long, 30 ft wide, 35 ft high
clockwork-castle.description: An enormous walking fortress driven by clockwork and magic that serves as a mobile stronghold.

helepolis.name: Helepolis
helepolis.space: 65 ft long, 65 ft wide, 130 ft high
helepolis.description: A towering wheeled siege tower pushed by hundreds of laborers to assault fortified walls.

sandsailer.name: Sandsailer
sandsailer.space: 15 ft long, 15 ft wide, 25 ft high
sandsailer.description: A towering wind-powered sailing craft built to skim swiftly over open desert at high speed.

vonthoss-golden-bridge.name: Vonthos's Golden Bridge
vonthoss-golden-bridge.space: 9 ft long, 9 ft wide, 9 ft high
vonthoss-golden-bridge.description: A flying clockwork-and-magic golden conveyance that soars through the air under a single pilot's control.

bone-ship.name: Bone Ship
bone-ship.space: 100 ft long, 20 ft wide, 25 ft high
bone-ship.description: A ghastly seagoing vessel assembled from bones that sails on the wind or is driven by dark magic.

bunta.name: Bunta
bunta.space: 5 ft long, 5 ft wide, 3 ft high
bunta.speeds: fly 40 feet (magical), swim 40 feet (magical), swim 20 feet (rowed)
bunta.description: A powerful artifact boat that flies, swims, and teleports, channeling the secret of souls against those it strikes.
